title: Require Service Spine Topology
forbids: a missing service or module spine boundary, or an undeclared top-level source category beside the admitted model, database, middleware, router, and test roots
why: Standalone services and API-embedded service interiors share one closed oRPC topology. Stable spine files keep composition visible, while model, database, middleware, router, and test roots admit only the extension axes a service may need.
remediate: Keep base.ts, contract.ts, impl.ts, modules, and router.ts at the service root. Keep contract.ts, module.ts, and one router.ts in every module. Move domain types, schemas, policy, ports, and helpers under model; keep database implementation under the optional root db directory; and split only middleware through the admitted file or directory forms.
message: Every service interior must retain the closed service and module spine topology.
